steps.title: Identify the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants to "indicate where the short story takes place." The correct choice must state the story's setting — its location.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — "Raymond's Run" takes place in Harlem.: directly states where the story is set — fulfills the goal. ✓
  • Choice B — "Raymond's Run" was published in Gorilla, My Love.: identifies the book in which the story appeared — does not indicate where the story takes place. ✗
  • Choice C — "Raymond's Run" is told from a first person perspective.: describes narrative point of view — does not indicate where the story takes place. ✗
  • Choice D — "Raymond's Run" was written by Maya Johnson.: identifies the author — does not indicate where the story takes place. ✗
That matches Choice A — "Raymond's Run" takes place in Harlem..
